title: Omni-Loom
tagline: Deterministic generative compilation for cyber-physical creativity.
thesis: As AI moves from content generation into cyber-physical production, creativity needs deterministic pipelines, not opaque improvisation.
problem: Generative AI systems are powerful but fundamentally untrustworthy for physical or production-grade workflows. Prompt-based systems mutate intent, produce non-reproducible outputs, skip geometry validation, ignore calibration, and dispatch fabrication without audit trails. When AI output moves into interfaces, materials, and machines, black-box improvisation becomes a liability.

architecture.name: FrayNode
architecture.responsibility: Converts raw human intent into a structured JobEnvelope without executing anything.

architecture.name: CSA Tool Orchestration API
architecture.responsibility: Generates deterministic ToolPlans and calls only approved tools.

architecture.name: Deterministic Tool Registry
architecture.responsibility: Controls which tools can execute and ensures outputs are reproducible.

architecture.name: WebGPU/WASM Runtime
architecture.responsibility: Separates rendering, physics, and interaction behavior into controlled layers.

architecture.name: Shytech
architecture.responsibility: Keeps expensive or sensitive systems dormant until intentionally activated.

architecture.name: CMYO Fabrication Bridge
architecture.responsibility: Transforms validated geometry into artifact-ready fabrication previews.

architecture.name: CNC/Laser/Embroidery Adapters
architecture.responsibility: Translate validated artifact data into process-specific preview formats.

pipeline.label: Human Intent
pipeline.description: Natural language creative directive entered by the user.

pipeline.label: FrayNode
pipeline.description: Parses and structures intent into a validated JobEnvelope.

pipeline.label: JobEnvelope
pipeline.description: Structured representation of user intent before any execution.

pipeline.label: CSA Tool Orchestration
pipeline.description: Generates a deterministic ToolPlan from the JobEnvelope.

pipeline.label: ToolPlan
pipeline.description: Ordered sequence of approved, deterministic tool calls.

pipeline.label: Geometry Validation
pipeline.description: Vector cleansing, closed-contour checks, and self-intersection removal.

pipeline.label: Artifact Manifest
pipeline.description: Traceable output record with checksum, metadata, and validation status.

skills.evidence: Designed multi-stage deterministic pipeline from intent to artifact.
Specified CMYO fabrication bridge, CNC/Laser/Embroidery adapter contracts.
All pipeline stages validated against TypeScript interfaces and JSON schemas.
Shytech dormant-runtime pattern prevents unauthorized system activation.
Unified generative creativity with engineering-grade auditability.
Proposed compiler metaphor as alternative to black-box prompt-response loops.

roadmap.name: Static Case Study
roadmap.description: Case study is readable, navigable, and publishable.

roadmap.name: Architecture Visualization
roadmap.description: Pipeline diagram and component cards render from structured data.

roadmap.name: Interactive Demo
roadmap.description: Simulated compiler demo: intent → JobEnvelope → ToolPlan → gates → manifest.

roadmap.name: Spec Pack
roadmap.description: Downloadable schemas, QA checklists, and implementation prompts.

roadmap.name: Funding Package
roadmap.description: Grant summary, pilot proposal, and partner outreach.

roadmap.name: Runtime Prototype
roadmap.description: Real schema validation, deterministic tool registry, WASM worker off main thread.
